'''Kalaan City''' was a major [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]] and home to a major [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base before [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. A bustling city of domed houses and rounded architecture, it boasted a [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] and was flanked by large statues of [[Kalaanite]]s. It was also the site of the [[Battle of Kalaan]], during which it was completely razed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
